V1_euler_lagrange.open_equation: box phi + m^2 phi + (lam/6) phi^3 + g rho = lam dC/dphi
V1_euler_lagrange.reason: C[phi] is never written out in v4; the EL system cannot be closed

V2_hamiltonian.caveat: verified for L WITHOUT the lam*C[phi] term (unwritable); v4 prints H without it too

V3_boundedness.assumptions: lam > 0; rho_n bounded with compact support (nuclear profile)
V3_boundedness.verdict: v4's boundedness claim VERIFIED under its stated assumptions

V4_dimensions.renormalizability_note: dimensionless quartic -> strictly renormalizable, NOT superrenormalizable by power counting; v11's quartic coupling had [g] = -4; v4 Section 1 carries the legacy superrenormalizability claim with no v4 derivation

V5_range.verdict: a 428.9 fm Yukawa IS 1/r to within 2.3% over the whole r = 1-10 fm window the paper quotes; the mass/range paradox the constraint C[phi] is invoked to resolve is a percent-level effect below ~40 fm and only becomes order-one at r >~ 400 fm

V6_A_linearity.verdict: E_int proportional to A holds to ~2% for ANY field with range >> R_nucleus once rho_n is normalized to A: the v4 'derivation' is the normalization identity int rho = A plus long-rangedness, and the A-linear ENERGY is equally a property of a standard per-nucleon scalar Yukawa coupling; distinguishing v4 substance lives in cross-sections, which v4 defers ('ongoing work')

V7_in_medium_phi.tadpole_minimum_formula: phi_min = -(6 g rho / lam)^(1/3) in the quartic regime
V7_in_medium_phi.lam_dependence: phi_min ~ lam^(-1/3); lam is not pinned numerically in v4
V7_in_medium_phi.verdict: the phi entering E_int ~= g phi A is fixed by nothing in the paper: no equation, no value; with the July g_J and lam = 1 the self-consistent in-medium value would be ~ -34 MeV, 74x m_phi

T1_lambda_collision: lambda is the quartic self-coupling in V(phi) AND the multiplier of C[phi] in the same Lagrangian line
T2_C_phi_unspecified: C[phi] appears only as prose + the one-line surface integral I = int phi delta_Sigma - Sigma_n with delta_Sigma undefined; no functional form anywhere
T3_drafting_artifacts: duplicated paragraphs (Sections 4.1/5), '[INSERT FIGURE 1 HERE]' placeholders, 'In Word, insert each figure image from your /OuroborosEli_figures folder'
